query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Riyadh
Destination: Alexandria Governorate
Dates: 2026-11-06 to 2026-11-07
Budget: Cheap
Party: Friends
Interests: Food Tourism, Cultural Tourism, Road Trips

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The generated Travel Plan adheres to the expected JSON schema, with all required fields present and correct data types used.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The plan suggests 'Ithaka Hostel' in Alexandria, explicitly described as 'budget-friendly', which aligns with the user's destination (Alexandria Governorate) and budget preference ('Cheap').

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The plan is for a 'Cheap' budget, but the budget breakdown has a significant mathematical discrepancy: the sum of 'Accommodation (1 night): EGP 30', 'Activities & Entrance Fees: EGP 4700', and 'Food & Dining (4 meals): EGP 1150' equals EGP 5880, which contradicts the 'Estimated Total per person (excluding transport): EGP 2940'. This inconsistency makes it impossible to accurately assess if the budget is respected. Furthermore, EGP 4700 for activities alone over two days seems high for a 'cheap' budget.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: The activities within each day are listed in a chronological order based on the provided time slots, flowing from morning to evening.

judge_grader.reason: All specified constraints (Destination, Duration, Budget, Number of People, Dates) are met by the travel plan.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A two-day, budget-friendly road trip from Cairo to Alexandria, designed for friends keen on cultural exploration and local food. This itinerary packs in an extensive list of Alexandria's historical and cultural gems, from ancient fortresses and Roman theaters to modern libraries and vibrant markets, alongside delicious seafood experiences.

activities.title: Hotel Check-in: Ithaka Hostel
activities.description: Arrive in Alexandria and check into your budget-friendly accommodation, Ithaka Hostel. Drop off your bags and prepare for a day of exploration.

activities.title: Citadel of Qaitbay
activities.description: Start your day with a visit to the iconic 15th-century defensive fortress, Citadel of Qaitbay, offering stunning views of the Mediterranean Sea. Explore its historic walls and learn about its strategic importance.

activities.title: Lunch at Fish Market
activities.description: Enjoy a fresh seafood lunch at Fish Market, known for its grilled sea bass and vibrant atmosphere, located conveniently near the Citadel.

activities.title: Alexandria Ancient Roman Theater
activities.description: Step back in time at the Alexandria Ancient Roman Theater, an archaeological site showcasing Roman-era ruins and a well-preserved amphitheater.

activities.title: Serapeum of Alexandria
activities.description: Explore the remains of the ancient Serapeum, a temple dedicated to the Greco-Egyptian god Serapis, featuring the iconic Pompey's Pillar.

activities.title: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
activities.description: Descend into the fascinating Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa, a series of Alexandrian tombs, statues, and archaeological objects that blend Roman, Greek, and Egyptian cultural features.

activities.title: تمثال الأشرعه البيضاء (White Sails Statue)
activities.description: Visit the 'White Sails Statue', a modern landmark along the Corniche, offering photo opportunities and views of the Mediterranean.

activities.title: Bibliotheca Alexandrina & Alexandria Bibliotheca
activities.description: Immerse yourself in knowledge at the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, a magnificent modern library and cultural center. Explore its vast collections and unique architecture, also covering the nearby 'Alexandria Bibliotheca' experience.

activities.title: Garden World War Victims
activities.description: Take a moment of reflection at the Garden World War Victims, a peaceful park dedicated to those who lost their lives.

activities.title: Alsoyouf
activities.description: Discover Alsoyouf, a local cultural spot offering insights into Alexandrian life and its vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Mahmoud Said Museum
activities.description: Visit the Mahmoud Said Museum, dedicated to one of Egypt's most prominent artists, showcasing his impressive works.

activities.title: Montaza Palace Gardens
activities.description: Stroll through the extensive and beautiful Montaza Palace Gardens, a perfect place for an evening walk with impressive architecture and greenery.

activities.title: Dinner at Greek Club Restaurant
activities.description: Conclude your day with dinner at the Greek Club Restaurant, known for its delicious Greek/Seafood cuisine, including fried calamari and mezze.

activities.title: Royal Jewelry Museum Alexandria
activities.description: Begin your second day exploring the opulent Royal Jewelry Museum, housed in a former palace and showcasing an exquisite collection of royal jewels and artifacts.

activities.title: Lunch at Gleem Bay, Alexandria
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful lunch at Gleem Bay, Alexandria, a popular café and patisserie known for its Chef's Specials and scenic views.

activities.title: Qaitbay Citadel
activities.description: Revisit (or get a different perspective of) the impressive Qaitbay Citadel, a powerful defensive fortress on the Mediterranean coast.

activities.title: Cavafy Museum
activities.description: Discover the Cavafy Museum, dedicated to the renowned Greek Alexandrian poet Constantine P. Cavafy, offering a glimpse into his life and work.

activities.title: Alexandria National Museum
activities.description: Explore the Alexandria National Museum, which houses a comprehensive collection of artifacts spanning Egypt's history, from ancient times to the modern era.

activities.title: Roman Villa of the Birds
activities.description: Visit the Roman Villa of the Birds, an archaeological site featuring beautiful mosaic floors depicting various bird species.

activities.title: Jewel sculpture
activities.description: Discover the 'Jewel sculpture', an artistic landmark contributing to Alexandria's modern cultural landscape.

activities.title: Antoniades Palace
activities.description: Explore the historic Antoniades Palace, known for its beautiful architecture and extensive gardens, offering a tranquil retreat.

activities.title: Alroshd Tourism
activities.description: Experience Alroshd Tourism, a local cultural point of interest with a highly-rated visitor experience.

activities.title: Cornish Sporting
activities.description: Enjoy a walk along Cornish Sporting, a vibrant area of Alexandria's Corniche, perfect for an evening stroll.

activities.title: temple black head
activities.description: Visit the 'temple black head', an interesting cultural site reflecting Alexandria's diverse historical layers.

activities.title: جولدن بيتش (Golden Beach)
activities.description: Conclude your sightseeing with a visit to 'جولدن بيتش' (Golden Beach), a popular spot to enjoy the evening coastal ambiance.

activities.title: Montaza Palace
activities.description: Discover the grandeur of Montaza Palace, an architectural marvel surrounded by magnificent gardens, offering a glimpse into royal history.

activities.title: Dinner at Portofino
activities.description: Savor your final dinner in Alexandria at Portofino, offering local and international cuisine with Chef's Specials, a perfect end to your cultural journey.

budget_breakdown: Estimated Total per person (excluding transport): EGP 2940
